chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Constitutional Petition No.S- 596 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Aijaz s/o Muhammad Ali through Mr. Muhammad Waseem, Advocate. Respondent No.1: Muhammad Khalid s/o Muhammad Yaqoob. Nemo. Respondent No.2: Learned 1st Senior Civil Judge/Rent Controller Hyderabad. Nemo. Date of hearing: 23.10.2025 Date of Order: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled Petition is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
